Rs.name: Strategic Resilience
Rs.note: Revenue HHI, segment velocity, strategic agility

Ro.name: Operational Resilience
Ro.note: Margin volatility, operating efficiency, SC risk

Rt.name: Technological Resilience
Rt.note: R&D intensity, tech debt (D_leg), patent renewal

Rf.name: Financial Resilience
Rf.note: Liquidity, leverage, FCF coverage, capital access

Rc.name: Cognitive Resilience
Rc.note: CEO tenure, mgmt diversity, exec rotation, innov_culture — requires Cohen kappa >= 0.70

groups.A: Collapses — Q should cross -0.20 before crisis event
groups.B: Adaptive jumps — Q approaches but does not cross -0.20
groups.C: Sustained resilience — Q remains above +0.28 throughout
